behavior.reason: The application runtime default is unchanged because it does not load the checked-in example.

documentation.effect: Setup guidance must describe the new default.

configuration.effect: The checked-in example uses the new default.

packaging.reason: No generated or packaged files change.

releaseArtifacts.reason: No release version or catalog changes.

migrations.reason: No persisted schema or data changes.

operationalStartup.effect: Users copy the documented value into configuration that startup consumes.

userWorkflows.effect: The setup workflow tells users how to apply the default.
